---
title: "Polymers, supramolecular complexes, and viruses"
---

[![Nylon 66, a structure formed by synthetic polyamines, similar to proteins (polyamides). Open the image in Jmol/JSmol.](ny6.png){width="40%"}](ny6.png)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/N%C3%A1ilon)
</p>

[![An example of virus (open the image in Jmol/JSmol).](virus.png){width="40%"}](virus.png)


<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/V%C3%ADrus)
</p>
